=== THE WITCH AND THE MONSTER ===

In this game, you will control a little witch on a quest to find and defeat a monster hiding behind a castle.

RULES:
- The monster hides behind one of two towers: the LEFT tower or the RIGHT tower.
- Whenever the little witch reaches either tower, she is able to attempt to find the monster by firing at the wall.
- Once you're in a tower, you can choose to fire. Each fire action takes 1 turn.
- You can move the witch to the right or the left tower of the castle. Switching between towers takes a certain amount of time, and you will not be able to fire during your travel.
- Each hit reduces the monster's life by 10 points.

GOAL:
Reduce the monster's life to 0. The monster starts with 400 life points.

=== GAME LOG ===
No actions yet. This is your first turn!

=== CURRENT STATE ===
Monster life: 400/400
Current turn: 1
You are at the center of the castle.

What do you do? (Turn 1)
A: Go to the LEFT tower
B: Go to the RIGHT tower

In this game, you will control a little witch on a quest to find and defeat a monster hiding behind a castle.

RULES:
- The monster hides behind one of two towers: the LEFT tower or the RIGHT tower.
- Whenever the little witch reaches either tower, she is able to attempt to find the monster by firing at the wall.
- Once you're in a tower, you can choose to fire. Each fire action takes 1 turn.
- You can move the witch to the right or the left tower of the castle. Switching between towers takes a certain amount of time, and you will not be able to fire during your travel.
- Each hit reduces the monster's life by 10 points.

GOAL:
Reduce the monster's life to 0. The monster starts with 400 life points.
